description: A White House graphic. It is a full-bleed photograph of Vice President JD Vance, bearded and in a dark blue suit with a red patterned tie and American-flag lapel pin, speaking at a lectern fitted with two microphones; the lectern bears the seal of the Vice President of the United States ('SEAL OF THE VICE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES' ringing an eagle crest). The setting is a warehouse venue with overhead lighting; the background is dark. The lower portion is overlaid with white text: a large serif headline 'VP Vance to Brief the Press at 1PM EST' and beneath it a sans-serif line 'Watch Live on White House Social Media.' A small white White House building logo is centered at the bottom.
notable_text: VP Vance to Brief the Press at 1PM EST | Watch Live on White House Social Media
